Qayd

Manage your infrastructure in one language — Arabic, native, local.

Qayd is a unified platform for managing cloud resources across multiple providers, designed for DevOps teams in the Kingdom and the region.

Discover Qayd

Key Features

Unified Management

A single pane for resources across AWS, OCI, Azure, and on-prem.

Infrastructure-as-Code

Native Terraform / OpenTofu workflow with templates tuned for the Saudi market.

Governance & Policy

Enforce compliance policies (NDMO, PDPL) before deployment.

Cost Control

Track and allocate spend by team, project, and environment.

Arabic-First

UI, alerts, and documentation available in native Arabic.

Qayd main dashboard
